title: Making New Friends in a Foreign Country

all.en: When I first arrived in Berlin to study abroad, I felt incredibly lonely and homesick.
all.zh: 當我第一次抵達柏林留學時，我感到無比孤單和想家。

all.en: I knew no one in the city, and my German was still quite basic.
all.zh: 我在這個城市誰也不認識，而且我的德文程度還很基礎。

all.en: During my first week, I forced myself to attend a welcome event for international students.
all.zh: 在第一週，我強迫自己參加了一場給國際學生的迎新活動。

all.en: There, I met Mateo from Spain and Akiko from Japan, who were just as nervous as I was.
all.zh: 在那裡，我認識了來自西班牙的馬泰歐和來自日本的明子，他們和我一樣緊張。

all.en: We bonded immediately over our shared struggles with directions and supermarket signs.
all.zh: 我們因為共同面對的方向感和超市標示困擾，立刻建立了情誼。

all.en: After the event, we exchanged contacts and agreed to explore the city together on weekends.
all.zh: 活動結束後，我們交換了聯絡方式，並約好在週末一起探索這座城市。

all.en: Mateo introduced us to delicious Spanish dishes, while Akiko taught us to make sushi rolls.
all.zh: 馬泰歐讓我們認識了美味的西班牙料理，而明子則教我們做壽司卷。

all.en: In return, I prepared traditional Taiwanese beef noodle soup for them one rainy Sunday.
all.zh: 作為回報，我在一個下雨的星期天為他們煮了傳統的台灣牛肉麵。

all.en: Together, we visited museums, attended language classes, and laughed at our funny mistakes.
all.zh: 我們一起參觀博物館、上語言課，並對彼此有趣的失誤大笑。

all.en: Slowly, this foreign city started to feel like a second home because of them.
all.zh: 漸漸地，因為他們，這個陌生的城市開始有了第二個家的感覺。

all.en: True friendship, I learned, can grow anywhere when people are open and kind.
all.zh: 我學到，當人們敞開心胸並心懷善意時，真正的友誼可以在任何地方滋長。

all.en: As the semester continued, our small group became a regular family of four friends.
all.zh: 隨著學期進行，我們的小團體成為了一個固定的四人朋友家庭。

all.en: A French student named Claire joined us after sharing a long bus ride one evening.
all.zh: 一位名叫克萊兒的法國學生在一個夜晚共乘公車後加入了我們。

all.en: She brought freshly baked croissants every Saturday morning to our shared apartment.
all.zh: 她每個星期六早上都會帶著新鮮出爐的可頌來我們合租的公寓。

all.en: Together we planned a long weekend trip to Prague during the spring break.
all.zh: 我們一起規劃了一場春假時前往布拉格的長週末旅行。

all.en: We took silly group photos on the famous bridge and got lost in narrow streets.
all.zh: 我們在那座著名的橋上拍了傻氣的合照，並在狹窄的巷弄中迷了路。

all.en: Mateo somehow guided us back using only a paper map and confident hand gestures.
all.zh: 馬泰歐不知怎地只靠一張紙地圖和自信的手勢，把我們帶回正確的路。

all.en: On the train back to Berlin, we promised to travel somewhere new every season.
all.zh: 在回柏林的火車上，我們約好每個季節都要去一個新的地方旅行。

all.en: When my German finally improved, I started ordering coffee without nervous pauses.
all.zh: 當我的德文終於進步時，我點咖啡時不再緊張停頓。

all.en: My friends cheered loudly the day I successfully held a full chat with the landlord.
all.zh: 我成功地與房東進行了一場完整對話的那天，朋友們大聲為我歡呼。

all.en: Berlin no longer felt foreign because these wonderful people had made it mine.
all.zh: 柏林不再讓人覺得陌生，因為這些美好的人讓它成了屬於我的城市。

all.en: In my second year in Berlin, I moved into a shared apartment with Mateo and Claire.
all.zh: 我在柏林的第二年，搬進了與馬泰歐和克萊兒同住的合租公寓。

all.en: We painted the kitchen walls bright yellow and hung photos from every trip we had taken.
all.zh: 我們把廚房牆面漆成亮黃色，並掛上我們每一次旅行的照片。

all.en: Akiko visited often and brought fresh sushi ingredients from a small Japanese shop nearby.
all.zh: 明子常常來訪，並從附近一間小日本商店帶來新鮮的壽司食材。

all.en: Together we started hosting monthly dinner parties for newly arrived international students.
all.zh: 我們開始每個月舉辦晚餐派對，款待剛抵達的國際學生。

all.en: I remembered how lonely my first weeks had been, so I made sure every guest felt seen.
all.zh: 我記得自己剛來時的孤單，所以總是用心讓每位客人都感到被看見。

all.en: One quiet student named Liu eventually became one of my closest friends in the city.
all.zh: 一位安靜的學生名叫小劉，後來成了我在這座城市最親近的朋友之一。

all.en: For Lunar New Year, our shared apartment hosted twenty friends from twelve different countries.
all.zh: 農曆新年時，我們的合租公寓招待了來自十二個不同國家的二十位朋友。

all.en: Mateo made paella in a massive pan while Akiko folded hundreds of tiny dumplings.
all.zh: 馬泰歐用一個巨大的平底鍋煮西班牙海鮮飯，明子則包了上百個小巧的水餃。

all.en: Claire decorated the entire living room with red lanterns and handmade paper flowers.
all.zh: 克萊兒用紅燈籠和手作紙花把整個客廳布置得喜氣洋洋。

all.en: That night, I realized Berlin had quietly become the place where my heart truly belonged.
all.zh: 那一晚，我意識到柏林已悄悄成為我心真正歸屬的地方。

all.en: By my third year in Berlin, our shared apartment had become a small landmark for newcomers.
all.zh: 在柏林的第三年，我們的合租公寓已成為新來者心目中的一個小地標。

all.en: University staff quietly recommended us to anxious students arriving alone for the first time.
all.zh: 大學教職員會悄悄地把我們推薦給第一次獨自抵達、感到焦慮的學生。

all.en: We expanded our monthly dinners into weekly conversation nights for anyone learning new languages.
all.zh: 我們把每月晚餐擴展為每週的對話之夜，歡迎任何正在學習新語言的人。

all.en: Mateo led the Spanish corner while Akiko patiently guided beginners through hiragana basics.
all.zh: 馬泰歐負責西班牙語區，明子則耐心地引導初學者學習平假名基礎。

all.en: Claire ran French poetry readings and gently corrected pronunciation with kind humor.
all.zh: 克萊兒主持法文詩朗讀，並以親切的幽默溫柔地修正發音。

all.en: I hosted Mandarin chat hours and taught everyone how to write their name in Chinese characters.
all.zh: 我主持中文聊天時段，教大家如何用中文字寫出自己的名字。

all.en: Liu surprised us all by quietly mastering five languages within just two short years.
all.zh: 小劉讓我們大吃一驚，他在短短兩年內默默地精通了五種語言。

all.en: He later applied to become a translator at a European cultural exchange organization.
all.zh: 他後來申請成為一個歐洲文化交流組織的翻譯員。

all.en: On the night he got the job, we celebrated until sunrise with paella, sushi, and dumplings.
all.zh: 他錄取的那晚，我們以海鮮飯、壽司和水餃慶祝直到日出。

all.en: Berlin, once cold and unfamiliar, had become a soft tapestry woven from every kind friendship.
all.zh: 曾經陌生而寒冷的柏林，已成為一幅由每一段溫柔友誼編織而成的柔軟掛毯。

all.en: After Liu's translator job, our weekly conversation nights grew into a registered nonprofit language exchange.
all.zh: 小劉成為翻譯員之後，我們每週的對話之夜成長為一個立案的非營利語言交流組織。

all.en: The city granted us a small room above a public library, and we filled it with secondhand chairs.
all.zh: 市政府撥給我們一間位於公共圖書館樓上的小房間，我們用二手椅子把它填滿。

all.en: Volunteers from every continent now lead sessions in twelve languages every single quiet Wednesday evening.
all.zh: 如今來自各大洲的志工，每個寧靜的星期三晚上以十二種語言主持聚會。

all.en: Mateo coordinates the schedule while Claire and Akiko design simple booklets for each beginner level.
all.zh: 馬泰歐負責安排時程，而克萊兒和明子則為每個初學程度設計簡單的小冊子。

all.en: I quietly handle the welcome desk because I still remember exactly how it felt to arrive alone.
all.zh: 我安靜地負責歡迎接待，因為我仍清楚記得獨自抵達時的感受。

all.en: Last month, a quiet woman from Brazil arrived shaking, just as I had years ago in Berlin.
all.zh: 上個月，一位來自巴西的安靜女子顫抖著走進來，就如同我多年前在柏林時的模樣。

all.en: I sat beside her, poured her hot tea, and listened without rushing her broken first sentences.
all.zh: 我坐在她身邊，倒了熱茶給她，靜靜聆聽她破碎不流暢的初次句子。

all.en: Within two months, she joined the Portuguese corner and now welcomes other newcomers herself every week.
all.zh: 短短兩個月內，她加入了葡萄牙語區，如今每週親自迎接其他新來的人。

all.en: That evening, Mateo, Claire, Akiko, Liu, and I shared a quiet bowl of soup in our old kitchen.
all.zh: 那晚，馬泰歐、克萊兒、明子、小劉和我在我們的舊廚房裡，安靜地共享一碗湯。

all.en: Berlin had given me family, and now our family was quietly giving the same gift to others.
all.zh: 柏林賦予了我家人，如今我們的家人也正悄悄地把同樣的禮物送給他人。

all.en: After five quiet years of running the language exchange, our nonprofit received a small city grant.
all.zh: 在安靜地經營語言交流五年之後，我們的非營利組織獲得了一筆小小的市政府補助。

all.en: We used the funds to translate basic city documents for newcomers struggling with German paperwork.
all.zh: 我們用這筆經費為苦於應付德文文件的新來者翻譯了基本的市政文件。

all.en: Mateo recruited volunteer lawyers willing to give free advice on rental contracts and visa renewals.
all.zh: 馬泰歐招募了願意免費提供租賃合約與簽證續簽建議的志工律師。

all.en: Akiko started a quiet support circle for students missing their families during long winter months.
all.zh: 明子開設了一個寧靜的支持小組，陪伴那些在漫長冬月裡想念家人的學生。

all.en: Claire organized monthly walking tours showing newcomers the hidden corners she had once feared.
all.zh: 克萊兒每月舉辦徒步導覽，帶新來者認識她曾經害怕過的隱藏角落。

all.en: Liu, now an experienced translator, returned every weekend to mentor younger volunteers patiently.
all.zh: 如今已是資深翻譯的小劉，每個週末都回來耐心地指導年輕志工。

all.en: Together we celebrated the welcome desk's thousandth visitor with a small handmade cake and laughter.
all.zh: 我們以一個小小的手作蛋糕和歡笑，慶祝歡迎接待處的第一千位訪客。

all.en: That visitor was a quiet grandfather who had moved to Berlin to live with his only daughter.
all.zh: 那位訪客是一位安靜的祖父，為了和獨生女同住而搬來柏林。

all.en: He hugged each of us like family, saying our small room felt warmer than any embassy office.
all.zh: 他像家人一樣擁抱我們每個人，說我們的小房間比任何大使館辦公室都更溫暖。

all.en: That night, we all walked home together under soft streetlights, feeling deeply, quietly, finally home.
all.zh: 那晚，我們在柔和的街燈下一同走回家，深深地、靜靜地、終於感受到家的歸屬。

all.en: The following summer, we hosted our first international friendship festival in a sunny city park.
all.zh: 隔年夏天，我們在一座陽光燦爛的城市公園裡舉辦了第一屆國際友誼節。

all.en: Each language corner set up a small tent with snacks, music, and welcoming smiles for everyone.
all.zh: 每個語言區都搭起一個小帳篷，準備了點心、音樂以及給每個人的歡迎笑容。

all.en: Mateo organized a friendly mini soccer tournament with players speaking eight different native languages.
all.zh: 馬泰歐安排了一場友誼性質的迷你足球賽，球員們講著八種不同的母語。

all.en: Akiko led a quiet origami workshop where children folded paper cranes and exchanged them with strangers.
all.zh: 明子主持了一場安靜的摺紙工作坊，孩子們摺出紙鶴並與陌生人交換。

all.en: Claire taught a small group simple French dance steps while everyone laughed at their own clumsy feet.
all.zh: 克萊兒教一小群人簡單的法式舞步，大家都對自己笨拙的腳步發笑。

all.en: Liu translated speeches between three guests of honor, hardly pausing despite shifting accents.
all.zh: 小劉在三位嘉賓之間翻譯演講，儘管口音不斷變換，他幾乎沒有停頓。

all.en: Thousands of visitors signed our friendship banner before sunset painted the park in gentle gold.
all.zh: 在夕陽把公園染成柔和金黃前，數千位訪客在我們的友誼布條上簽了名。

all.en: Local newspapers wrote glowing stories about the quiet power of student-led community language exchange.
all.zh: 當地報紙寫了讚譽有加的報導，談學生主導的社區語言交流所擁有的安靜力量。

all.en: That winter, our nonprofit was invited to advise three other European cities planning similar programs.
all.zh: 那年冬天，我們的非營利組織受邀為三個歐洲城市提供類似計畫的諮詢建議。

all.en: Looking back, I realized one nervous welcome event had quietly shaped many lives across many countries.
all.zh: 回首過往，我體會到一場令人緊張的迎新活動，竟悄悄影響了許多國家中許多人的生命。

all.en: Ten years after I first arrived in Berlin, I quietly decided to settle in the city forever.
all.zh: 在我第一次抵達柏林十年之後，我靜靜地決定永遠在這座城市定居。

all.en: Mateo, Claire, Akiko, Liu, and I co-purchased a small old building near our beloved language exchange.
all.zh: 馬泰歐、克萊兒、明子、小劉和我合資買下了一棟靠近我們深愛的語言交流會的小型老建築。

all.en: We renovated it slowly, creating gentle housing for newcomers struggling to find their first quiet German apartment.
all.zh: 我們慢慢翻修，為那些苦於找不到第一間安靜德國公寓的新來者打造溫柔的住所。

all.en: Each tenant stayed up to six months, paying gentle rent and helping organize weekly community welcome dinners.
all.zh: 每位房客最多入住六個月，繳付溫和的租金，並協助組織每週的社區歡迎晚餐。

all.en: Akiko designed the small communal kitchen, hanging warm paper lanterns above a long shared wooden table.
all.zh: 明子設計了小巧的共用廚房，在一張長長的共享木桌上方掛起溫暖的紙燈籠。

all.en: Mateo painted a bright welcome mural near the entrance, depicting hands joined around our beloved adopted city.
all.zh: 馬泰歐在入口附近畫了一幅明亮的歡迎壁畫，描繪雙手環繞著我們深愛的這座城市。

all.en: Claire stocked the entry shelf with poetry books in twelve different languages, free for anyone to borrow.
all.zh: 克萊兒在門口的書架上擺滿十二種語言的詩集，供任何人免費借閱。

all.en: Liu hosted gentle Saturday breakfasts where new tenants slowly learned to trust strangers becoming familiar friends.
all.zh: 小劉主持溫柔的星期六早餐，讓新房客慢慢學會信任那些將成為熟悉朋友的陌生人。

all.en: On our building's opening day, dozens of past welcome desk visitors returned to celebrate together quietly.
all.zh: 在我們建築物的開幕日，數十位昔日歡迎接待處的訪客回來一同安靜地慶祝。

all.en: Standing among them, I realized that loneliness had quietly become the seed of an entire chosen family.
all.zh: 站在他們之中，我意識到孤單已悄悄成為一整個自選家族的種子。
